query:
UPDATE places SET 
  description = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN 'Malé is the capital and largest city of the Maldives, located in Kaafu Atoll. It serves as the political, economic, and cultural center of the nation. The city is known for its colorful buildings, bustling markets, mosques, and vibrant street life. Malé International Airport is the main gateway to the Maldives.'
    WHEN 'Dhigurah' THEN 'Dhigurah is a local island in Vaavu Atoll known for its long sandy beaches and vibrant local culture. The island is famous for whale shark and manta ray encounters, making it a popular destination for marine enthusiasts. It offers a more authentic Maldivian experience compared to resort islands.'
    WHEN 'Maafushi' THEN 'Maafushi is a popular local island in Kaafu Atoll offering budget-friendly accommodation and authentic Maldivian experiences. The island is known for its coral reef diving, house reef snorkeling, and friendly local community. It is an ideal destination for backpackers and budget travelers.'
    WHEN 'Hulhumalé' THEN 'Hulhumalé is an artificial island in Kaafu Atoll developed as a modern residential and tourism hub. It is home to Malé International Airport and offers modern amenities, shopping centers, and water sports facilities. The island provides easy access to the capital and nearby dive sites.'
    WHEN 'Thulusdhoo' THEN 'Thulusdhoo is a local island in Kaafu Atoll famous for its coral manufacturing and diving opportunities. The island has a strong local community and offers authentic Maldivian experiences. It is known for its house reef and proximity to excellent dive sites.'
  END,
  highlights = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN '["Capital City", "Cultural Hub", "Shopping & Dining", "Historical Mosques"]'
    WHEN 'Dhigurah' THEN '["Whale Shark Encounters", "Manta Ray Watching", "Local Culture", "Beautiful Beaches"]'
    WHEN 'Maafushi' THEN '["Budget Friendly", "House Reef Diving", "Local Guesthouses", "Authentic Culture"]'
    WHEN 'Hulhumalé' THEN '["Modern Infrastructure", "Airport Access", "Shopping Centers", "Water Sports"]'
    WHEN 'Thulusdhoo' THEN '["Coral Manufacturing", "House Reef Diving", "Local Community", "Dive Sites"]'
  END,
  amenities = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN '["Hotels", "Restaurants", "Shopping Malls", "Hospitals", "Banks"]'
    WHEN 'Dhigurah' THEN '["Guesthouses", "Local Restaurants", "Dive Centers", "Shops"]'
    WHEN 'Maafushi' THEN '["Budget Guesthouses", "Dive Shops", "Restaurants", "Bars"]'
    WHEN 'Hulhumalé' THEN '["Hotels", "Shopping Malls", "Restaurants", "Water Sports Centers"]'
    WHEN 'Thulusdhoo' THEN '["Guesthouses", "Dive Centers", "Local Restaurants", "Shops"]'
  END,
  icon = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN 'city'
    ELSE 'island'
  END,
  color = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN '#FF6B6B'
    ELSE '#4ECDC4'
  END,
  rating = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN 4.2
    WHEN 'Dhigurah' THEN 4.5
    WHEN 'Maafushi' THEN 4.3
    WHEN 'Hulhumalé' THEN 4.1
    WHEN 'Thulusdhoo' THEN 4.2
  END,
  reviews = CASE name
    WHEN 'Malé' THEN 1250
    WHEN 'Dhigurah' THEN 856
    WHEN 'Maafushi' THEN 1050
    WHEN 'Hulhumalé' THEN 623
    WHEN 'Thulusdhoo' THEN 445
  END
WHERE name IN ('Malé', 'Dhigurah', 'Maafushi', 'Hulhumalé', 'Thulusdhoo');
